intro: Between 13 and 24 April 2026, ZCyberNews published 16 articles under the cloud-security tag. The coverage included two critical and ten high-severity items. Threat actor APT41 was identified among the top adversaries. The most prominent vulnerability was CVE-2026-33413, which carries a CVSS score of 8.8. Affected sectors included technology, cloud services, government, healthcare, and cloud service providers, with impacts reported globally and in Israel.
